about.title: About Us
about.body: International Love Dating Club is a premium international matchmaking agency with three service centers in LA, SF, and Las Vegas, dedicated to matching every member with a real, suitable, and lasting partner.

items.name: Marriage Enrichment Team
items.desc: Marriage is not the finish line but a new beginning — we walk with you into real intimate life.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About International Love Dating Club
about.story1Body: Founded in 2019 and headquartered in Los Angeles, International Love Dating Club is a professional organization focused on high-end international matchmaking and women's personal growth. We operate service centers in Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Las Vegas, with branches and over 100 partner agencies across China. We've helped over 30,000 women from all walks of life build sincere, lasting relationships with quality men from the US, UK, France, Canada, and Australia. Founded by a team of women with cross-cultural marriage experience and emotional expertise, we're here to walk beside you — through confusion and courage, from longing to lasting love.
about.missionBody: To inspire with life, to heal with light. To awaken lost hearts with kindness, to guide broken spirits with faith. We empower every woman with the strength and wisdom to grow, to love, and to claim her own happiness.
about.visionBody: To lead women toward growth and global love. To offer every woman a personalized path to happiness. So she may become her best self — and meet the right person to build a life with.

values.name: Growth
values.desc: Change is power, and you deserve it

values.name: Companionship
values.desc: We don't just match — we walk with you

founders.name: Jessie
founders.body: Let us walk toward the light, for there is a remarkable woman behind it: Ms. Jessie Feng, our beloved founder of International Love Dating Club. Through years of dedicated learning in online emotional communication, she found her own soulmate and now lives in Los Angeles, California. Since January 2020, she has appeared as an emotional-life livestream host and, over four years and more than a thousand sessions, has answered relationship questions from tens of millions of women. With deep research into online relationship selection, communication, and long-term partnership, she has guided countless women toward new lives across the globe. To better support women who need help, she launched International Love Dating Club — wishing to be a light that illuminates their path, sharing happiness and passing on kindness, faith, warmth, and love.

founders.name: Anna
founders.body: Among countless faces, there is one woman of singular charm — Ms. Anna Jiang, co-founder of International Love Dating Club. In 2017, through diligent study of online dating skills, she attracted a wonderful gentleman from the United States. In 2018, they married in Los Angeles and began a beautiful life together. Gentle, kind, and grounded, Anna combines high emotional intelligence with deep wisdom. In 2019 she created our distinctive one-on-one high-end private-bespoke service. Her work is rooted in love and gratitude — helping more women find their own happiness, guiding them to understand Western culture and emotional needs of partners, and attracting the soulmates they have been hoping for.

oneOnOne.title: One-on-One Service
oneOnOne.subtitle: Senior Coach, Full-Journey Support
oneOnOne.intro: From sign-up to first hand-hold, every step is accompanied by a dedicated coach — guarding every introduction, every date, every relationship.
oneOnOne.processSubtitle: Six steps to begin your happiness journey

steps.title: Register & Complete Profile
steps.desc: Sign up quickly, upload photos, and fill out detailed profile and partner preferences.

steps.title: Profile Review & Verification
steps.desc: Our team verifies your identity and credentials to ensure authentic members.

steps.title: One-on-One Consultation
steps.desc: A dedicated consultant reaches out to deeply understand your values and preferences.

steps.title: Curated Match Recommendations
steps.desc: Based on compatibility and preferences, we recommend carefully selected matches.

steps.title: Online Communication
steps.desc: Start conversations with matches on our secure messaging platform.

steps.title: Offline Meetings & Bonding
steps.desc: We arrange in-person meetings to begin your real love story.

oneOnOne.coachTitle: A Dedicated Consultant Who Walks With You
oneOnOne.coachBody: Every member is paired with a dedicated consultant who deeply understands your values, lifestyle, and emotional needs. We don't just make introductions — we walk with you the entire way.
oneOnOne.coachesSubtitle: A seasoned, cross-cultural coaching team walking the journey with you

coaches.name: Xiaowei
coaches.title: One-on-one coaching consultation
coaches.body: Family & relationship counselor · State-certified psychological counselor · Coaching-technique trainer. Rich international dating experience and a master of communication strategy. Are you ready to meet your future?

coaches.name: Xiaolu
coaches.title: Fast-track online dating coaching
coaches.body: Married her husband through the internet in 2020 and now lives in Ohio, USA. Years of psychology research informs targeted, fast-track online dating coaching. Two things bring you closer to the life you want: make choices that fit you, and surround yourself with mentors and good friends.

coaches.name: Duo'er
coaches.title: Cross-cultural relationship bridge
coaches.body: Foreign-languages university background; studied human psychology at Yale. A bicultural anchor based in the US, equipped with the five wings of attraction, control, communication, repair, and mindset. Focused on cross-cultural relationship bridges and untangling international dating challenges. Hold the dream; fear not the distance.

coaches.name: Amy
coaches.title: Family & marriage counselor
coaches.body: Family-education advisor · Harvard psychology certification (in progress) · second master's in literary psychotherapy (in progress) · dual master's in English language and literature. Nearly 30 years as a university lecturer, with tens of thousands of English-training talks and over a thousand family-education talks. Deep international-education background; fluent in cross-cultural communication. Husband is Italian-American; based in the US.

coaches.name: Yufei
coaches.title: Hands-on international-dating coach
coaches.body: Single mother for ten years; began her cross-cultural dating journey in October 2022 and married her American husband in China in 2023. Sincerely shares her successful online international-dating playbook — how to communicate, connect, and live with Western men. Focus on health, women's wellness, and healing of marital relationships.

coaches.name: Vivian
coaches.title: Picking quality men in cross-cultural marriage
coaches.body: Four years of online dating; through study became a woman of high EQ, high IQ, and high energy, and married her husband on Christmas 2023. In a global village, luck in love comes more from your courage, awareness, and capability. You are the first person responsible for your own life — expand the search radius and you can write your own love story. Theory plus practice; based in Los Angeles.

coaches.name: Vare
coaches.title: Cross-cultural marriage & parenting coach
coaches.body: Once a single mother of two; cross-cultural marriage rewrote her family's trajectory. Brings a distinctive perspective and method to online dating and international marriage, plus expertise in mending parent–child relationships. Don't look for reasons to fail — look for ways to succeed.

coaches.name: Grace
coaches.title: Veteran international-dating coach
coaches.body: Cross-cultural love opened another door for me. Years of accumulated experience in online international dating. I embrace those who need help with love and warmth. Use your limited time to create unlimited beauty.

coaches.name: Anne
coaches.title: EQ & love-quotient growth coach
coaches.body: Single mother of two with countless dating experiences; understands the importance of EQ and love-quotient. Graduate of South China Normal University in human psychology; rich international-dating experience; certified health manager. Shares everything she has lived and practiced with sisters. Don't look for reasons to fail — look for ways to succeed.

coaches.name: Mia
coaches.title: One-on-one coaching consultation
coaches.body: Ten years in the US, with rich international-dating experience. Has already helped many sisters begin a happy life abroad.

custom.title: Custom Matchmaking
custom.subtitle: Bespoke Plans For A Unique You
custom.intro: A matching plan tailored to your preferences, lifestyle, and life stage. Three tiers to meet every need.
custom.whyBody: High-net-worth individuals, overseas Chinese, and accomplished singles have more specific criteria and less time. Custom matchmaking is led by a senior director in person, with precise in-circle sourcing — so every meeting is worth your time.

basicTiers.name: Plan B
features: Coaching team helps you register on three dating platforms

features: 6 months of relationship coaching + 6 months of dedicated companionship

successCases.title: Success Stories
successCases.subtitle: Real Couples, Real Happiness
successCases.intro: Real stories of couples who found love through International Love.

cases.title: CEO & Medical Scientist
cases.story: I came to the US in March 2022. Thanks to the professional team at International Love, I met my husband — a double postdoc from Stanford and Harvard. We got married in August that same year and now live in Phoenix, Arizona.

cases.title: Teacher & Professor
cases.story: With the matchmaker's help I met Jack, a university professor now living in Arizona. He flies home every week to be with me and our family.

cases.title: Beauty Influencer & Lawyer
cases.story: Through International Love I met David, a US attorney. We registered our marriage in China — real love is not limited by distance.

cases.title: Hotel Owner & Training Academy Owner
cases.story: I run a hotel back home. In 2021 I met my wife, who runs a coaching academy. We share the same lifestyle and love of fine wine. Engaged at 24, married the next year, now living a peaceful family life together.

cases.title: Sister-in-law & Lawyer
cases.story: I'm Wendy, from Shanghai. My sister-in-law introduced International Love. I got married this year and have received my green card.

cases.title: Sister-in-law & NYC Official
cases.story: I'm Susan, 63. Wendy's sister-in-law. I married a senior NYC official this year and received my green card — every day is beautiful.

cases.title: A New Chapter At 61
cases.story: I'm Rong, 61. With the help of International Love I met my husband, we married this year, and I now live happily in the US with my green card.

cases.title: Business Owner & Dental Consultant
cases.story: I'm Vera, 45, with a daughter. International Love introduced me to my 54-year-old husband, a dental consultant. A simple, beautiful wedding and a warm family life.

cases.title: Nurse & Building Supply Owner
cases.story: I was a nurse in China. Through International Love I met my husband, who owns a home building supply store. We married at Christmas and honeymooned in Canada.

cases.title: Singaporean Chinese & Professor
cases.story: I'm Jie, a Singaporean-Chinese media professional. With my sister's help I met my husband, a university professor. We met in Thailand and married in China last year, now awaiting a Canadian visa.

cases.title: Tutor & Engineer
cases.story: I'm Helen, a former Chinese teacher. Through International Love I met my engineer husband. We now live together in Canada.

cases.title: Realtor & Realty Firm Owner
cases.story: I'm Vicky from Hong Kong. Introduced by matchmaker Anna, I met my husband, who owns his own realty firm. We are married and living in Texas.

cases.title: Doctor & Air Force Medic
cases.story: I'm Min, a doctor. Through International Love I met my husband, a military medic. After 12 years single, I finally found my life companion.

cases.title: Realtor & Doctor
cases.story: Sisi met her doctor husband in the US Midwest, now happily married in Washington. Her daughter also joined her and is now in college.

cases.title: Dance Teacher & Teacher
cases.story: I'm Nina, a former dance teacher from Beijing. Through International Love I met my teacher husband. Life gets better every day — we now live on the PV Hills.
